## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects and align on priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is currently focused on three main areas: integration pages, SEO content, and integration guides](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Code components project is in early stages; team to provide more specific guidance on requirements](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [End of October target for having a set of example code components ready for WebflowConf](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [SEO articles need adjustments to align with Webflow's brand guidelines for faster production](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [Team is producing 30-40 integration pages per week](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Mapped out 600-700 potential pages; focusing on 300-400 that make most sense](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Aiming to complete remaining pages and evaluate additional ones afterwards](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### SEO Content Development

  - [One article completed, several in review](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Sydney leading this effort; async communication ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Vivian highlighted need for visuals to align with Webflow's brand font and colors](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

### Integration Guides

  - [Currently in early stages; aiming for 3-5 guides per week](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Focus on Webflow-specific solutions (e.g., Webflow Cloud) when possible](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Team to provide draft for review by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### Code Components Project

  - [Zach shared PR for base Shadcn components as a starting point](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Discussion on how to present components (e.g., individual vs. library approach)](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Team to provide clearer vision and example of desired output](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Target: Have a set of popular/desirable code components ready by end of October for WebflowConf](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

### SEO Article Refinements

  - [Vivian shared feedback on brand alignment in thread](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Luke emphasized importance of following brand guidelines for faster production](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Composable Commerce and REST API articles approved; others pending review](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to focus on completing integration guides as top priority](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Zach to merge PR for base Shadcn components as reference](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Jason to get engineering resources on code components after integration guides](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Team to clean up integration page name fields for consistent titling](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Jason to type up meeting notes and update Colin](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Internal discussion on necessity of tomorrow's duplicate meeting with Colin](https://fathom.video/share/wJ1kws4ecQNhwNz6BJPY1awLvQA5mCsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
